style_description: Soft watercolor illustrations with gentle washes, perfect for bedtime and nature stories

specifications.safe_zone: Keep important elements 0.5 inches from trim

consistency_notes: Maintain same art style across all illustrations
Keep character designs consistent (save reference images)
Ensure text areas remain clear for overlay
